sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85161" key="polupaqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-πᾰθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">παθεῖν</etym>) <sense id="n85161.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">subject to many passions</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impressions,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">π. κακῶν ταμιεῖον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:149" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">149</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ψυχή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.97b</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full of diverse reactions,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νόσημα</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">171e</biblScope> </bibl>; poet. <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πουλ-</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much perturbed,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τύραννοι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.98</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Stat. Flacc.).</sense> </entryFree>
